title: aruba glabra
intro: Aruba glabra, also known as the thorny buffalo berry, is a shrub plant native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Aruba glabra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves and stems.
